/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/untitled.dir/untitled_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/untitled.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/untitled.dir/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/untitled.dir/agenda.cpp.o CMakeFiles/untitled.dir/agendaView.cpp.o CMakeFiles/untitled.dir/patientview.cpp.o CMakeFiles/untitled.dir/appointmentdelegate.cpp.o CMakeFiles/untitled.dir/db.cpp.o -o untitled.app/Contents/MacOS/untitled -F/opt/homebrew/opt/qt@6/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/opt/qt@6/lib /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@6/lib/QtWidgets.framework/Versions/A/QtWidgets /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@6/lib/QtSql.framework/Versions/A/QtSql /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@6/lib/QtGui.framework/Versions/A/QtGui -framework AGL -framework AppKit -framework OpenGL -framework ImageIO -framework Metal /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@6/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers
